---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Héloïse CALZAN"
date: "08/03/2022"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
setwd("E:\\github\\travail_github\\Stage_M2_Calzan")

library(readr)
tableau_donnees_3 <- read.csv("tableau_donnees_filtrees_3.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
tableau_sp_c_3 <- read.csv("tableau_sp_cohorte_3.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

explorations des tableaux
```{r, include=FALSE}
#tableau_donnees_3
summary(tableau_donnees_3)
sapply(tableau_donnees_3,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_donnees_3, FUN = class)

tableau_donnees_3$Area <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$Area)
tableau_donnees_3$Species <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$Species)
tableau_donnees_3$Sex <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$Sex)
tableau_donnees_3$Maturity <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$Maturity)
tableau_donnees_3$AphiaID <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$AphiaID)

sapply(tableau_donnees_3, FUN = levels)

summary(tableau_donnees_3$LngtClass)
summary(tableau_donnees_3$Age)
#creation d'une colonne fcaohorte pour cohorte en factor ==> qui servira pour les glm
tableau_donnees_3$fcohorte <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$Cohorte)

#tableau_sp_c_3
summary(tableau_sp_c_3)
sapply(tableau_sp_c_3,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_sp_c_3, FUN = class)

tableau_sp_c_3$Species <- as.factor(tableau_sp_c_3$Species)
tableau_sp_c_3$Cohorte_factor <- as.factor(tableau_sp_c_3$Cohorte_factor)

sapply(tableau_sp_c_3, FUN = levels)
```


Figure lm avec cohorte en variable explicative
```{r, fig.width=13,fig.height=5,fig.show='hide'}
library(ggplot2)
##Figure

ggplot(data = tableau_sp_c_3, aes(x = Cohorte, y = SR)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  #geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, fullrange=FALSE, level=0.95) +
  facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free_x", ncol = 5) +
  theme_light()

#ggsave("plot_sp.png", width = 13, height = 6)
```


Librairies modèles
```{r library,include=FALSE}
library(lmtest)
library(lme4)
library(car)
library(nlme)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```


**avec indice NAO**
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_NAO <- read.csv("Monthly mean NAO index since January 1950.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
summary(tableau_NAO)
sapply(tableau_NAO,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_NAO, FUN = class)
str(tableau_NAO)

tableau_NAO <- tableau_NAO[-73,]

names(tableau_NAO)[names(tableau_NAO) == "V1"] <- "Date"
names(tableau_NAO)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")


tableau_NAO <- mutate(tableau_NAO, Moy_NAO = rowMeans(select(tableau_NAO, Janvier : Decembre), na.rm = TRUE))

Moy_NAO <- rowMeans(tableau_NAO[,2:13], na.rm = TRUE) 
tableau_NAO$Moy_NAO <- Moy_NAO

#tableau_NAO2 <- tableau_NAO %>% pivot_longer(c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")) 
#names(tableau_NAO2)[names(tableau_NAO2) == "name"] <- "Mois"
#names(tableau_NAO2)[names(tableau_NAO2) == "value"] <- "indice_NAO"

plot(tableau_NAO$Moy_NAO ~ tableau_NAO$Date)
lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO)
summary(lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))
plot(lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))

#summary(lmer(indice_NAO ~ Date + (1|Mois), data = tableau_NAO2))
```
Le tableau_NAO au dessus avec le #ont été trouvé à partir de ce site :
<https://www.cpc.ncep.noaa.gov/products/precip/CWlink/pna/nao_index.html>

```{r}
#tableau_nao_moy_JFM <- read.csv("moyennes_nao_jfm.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```
le tableau_nao_moy_JFM s'appuit sur les données de ce site :
<https://psl.noaa.gov/data/climateindices/>

<https://psl.noaa.gov/cgi-bin/data/climateindices/corr.pl?tstype1=3&custname1=&custtitle1=&tstype2=0&custname2=&custtitle2=&year1=&year2=&itypea=0&y1=&y2=&plotstyle=0&length=&lag=&iall=0&iseas=1&mon1=0&mon2=2&anom=0&climo1_yr1=&climo1_yr2=&climo2_yr1=&climo2_yr2=&Submit=Calculate+Results>

moyenne du la NAO pour Janvier Fevrier Mars

```{r}
tableau_NAO <- mutate(tableau_NAO, Moy_NAO_JFM = rowMeans(select(tableau_NAO, Janvier : Mars), na.rm = TRUE))
summary(lm(Moy_NAO_JFM ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))

table_NAO_JFM <- tableau_NAO[,c("Date", "Moy_NAO_JFM")]
names(table_NAO_JFM)[names(table_NAO_JFM) == "Date"] <- "Cohorte"# pour que ce soit compatible avec les années cohortes des tableaux des espèces

ggplot(tableau_NAO, aes(x = Date, y = Moy_NAO_JFM)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line()+
  theme_classic()
#ggsave("moy_nao.png", width = 13, height = 6)
remove(tableau_NAO)
```


**AMO** : 
<https://psl.noaa.gov/data/timeseries/AMO/>
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_AMO_d<- read.csv("AMO unsmoothed, detrended from the Kaplan SST V2.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tableau_AMO_d)[names(tableau_AMO_d) == "V1"] <- "Cohorte"
names(tableau_AMO_d)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")

summary(tableau_AMO_d)
sapply(tableau_AMO_d,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_AMO_d, FUN = class)
str(tableau_AMO_d)

tableau_AMO_d <- tableau_AMO_d[-75,]


ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Janvier), colour = "#006666") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Fevrier), colour = "#003399") +
  theme_classic()
    
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mars), colour = "#9933FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Avril), colour = "#FF33FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mai), colour = "#993366") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juin), colour = "#990000") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juillet), colour = "#FF6600") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Aout), colour = "#FFCC33") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Septembre), colour = "#669900") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Octobre), colour = "#66CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Novembre), colour = "#00CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Decembre), colour = "#33FFFF") +
  theme_classic()



cor(tableau_AMO_d[,c("Janvier", "Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre", "Decembre")])

tableau_AMO_d <- mutate(tableau_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_d = rowMeans(select(tableau_AMO_d, Janvier : Decembre), na.rm = TRUE))
ggplot(tableau_AMO_d, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Moy_AMO_d), colour = "#CC00CC") +
  theme_classic()

tableau_AMO_d_moy <- tableau_AMO_d[,c("Cohorte", "Moy_AMO_d")]
remove(tableau_AMO_d)
```

**AMO non détendancé**
```{r}

tableau_AMO_brute <- read.csv("AMO_non_detandence.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tableau_AMO_brute)[names(tableau_AMO_brute) == "V1"] <- "Cohorte"
names(tableau_AMO_brute)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")

tableau_AMO_brute <- tableau_AMO_brute[-which(tableau_AMO_brute$Cohorte < 1948),]
tableau_AMO_brute <- tableau_AMO_brute[-which(tableau_AMO_brute$Cohorte == "AMO"),]#on enlève la dernière ligne
tableau_AMO_brute <- tableau_AMO_brute[-which(tableau_AMO_brute$Cohorte == 2022),]

summary(tableau_AMO_brute)

tableau_AMO_brute[,1] <- as.integer(tableau_AMO_brute[,1])
tableau_AMO_brute[,2] <- as.numeric(tableau_AMO_brute[,2])
tableau_AMO_brute[,3] <- as.numeric(tableau_AMO_brute[,3])
tableau_AMO_brute[,4] <- as.numeric(tableau_AMO_brute[,4])

sapply(tableau_AMO_brute,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_AMO_brute, FUN = class)
str(tableau_AMO_brute)

tableau_AMO_brute <- mutate(tableau_AMO_brute, Moy_AMO_brute = rowMeans(select(tableau_AMO_brute, Janvier : Decembre), na.rm = TRUE))
tableau_AMO_brute_moy <- tableau_AMO_brute[,c("Cohorte", "Moy_AMO_brute")]
#tableau_AMO_brute_moy$Cohorte <- as.numeric(tableau_AMO_brute_moy$Cohorte)
remove(tableau_AMO_brute)
```

**GSNW**
<http://www.pml-gulfstream.org.uk/data.htm> ==> Cruises 
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_GSNW <- read.csv("GSNW_month.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tableau_GSNW)[names(tableau_GSNW) == "Year"] <- "Cohorte"
names(tableau_GSNW)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")

summary(tableau_GSNW)
sapply(tableau_GSNW,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_GSNW, FUN = class)
str(tableau_GSNW)

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Janvier), colour = "#006666") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Fevrier), colour = "#003399") +
  theme_classic()
    
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mars), colour = "#9933FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Avril), colour = "#FF33FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mai), colour = "#993366") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juin), colour = "#990000") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juillet), colour = "#FF6600") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Aout), colour = "#FFCC33") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Septembre), colour = "#669900") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Octobre), colour = "#66CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Novembre), colour = "#00CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Decembre), colour = "#33FFFF") +
  theme_classic()

cor(tableau_GSNW[,c("Janvier", "Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre", "Decembre")])

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Annual), colour = "#CC00CC") +
  theme_classic()


tableau_GSNW_moy <- tableau_GSNW[,c("Cohorte", "Annual")]
names(tableau_GSNW_moy)[names(tableau_GSNW_moy) == "Annual"] <- "GSNW_moy"
remove(tableau_GSNW)
```

**SST**
```{r}
table_SST_MN <- read.csv("table_SST_MN.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(table_SST_MN)[names(table_SST_MN) == "annee"] <- "Cohorte"
```

**glm**
Fonctions utiles
```{r}
F_fusion_df <- function(tableau, Cohorte){
  tableau <- merge(tableau, table_NAO_JFM, by = c(Cohorte))
  tableau <- merge(tableau, tableau_AMO_d_moy, by = c(Cohorte))
  tableau <- merge(tableau, tableau_AMO_brute_moy, by = c(Cohorte))
  tableau <- merge(tableau, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c(Cohorte))
  tableau <- merge(tableau, table_SST_MN, by = c(Cohorte))
  tableau <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = tableau)
  return(tableau)
}
#centrer réduire les variables explicatives 
fonction_scale_i <- function(tableau){
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_cohorte = as.numeric(scale(Cohorte)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_LngtClass = as.numeric(scale(LngtClass)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_age = as.numeric(scale(Age)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_Moy_NAO_JFM = as.numeric(scale(Moy_NAO_JFM)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_moy_AMO_d = as.numeric(scale(Moy_AMO_d)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_moy_AMO_brute = as.numeric(scale(Moy_AMO_brute)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_moy_GSNW = as.numeric(scale(GSNW_moy)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_SST = as.numeric(scale(sst_i)))
}

fonction_corr <- function(tableau){
  #tableau de correlation
  corr <- cor(tableau[which(tableau[,"Cohorte"] > 1966 & tableau[, "Cohorte"] < 2019),c("sc_cohorte", "sc_LngtClass", "sc_age", "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", "sc_moy_AMO_d", "sc_moy_AMO_brute", "sc_moy_GSNW", "sc_SST")])
  return(corr)
}


fonction_polynome<- function(tableau) {
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, Age_2 = Age^2)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, Age_3 = Age^3)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_age_2 = as.numeric(scale(Age_2)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_age_3 = as.numeric(scale(Age_3)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, LngtClass_2 = LngtClass^2)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, LngtClass_3 = LngtClass^3)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_LngtClass_2 = as.numeric(scale(LngtClass_2)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_LngtClass_3 = as.numeric(scale(LngtClass_3)))
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (Age_2, .after = Age)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (Age_3, .after = Age_2)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (sc_age_2, .after = sc_age)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (sc_age_3, .after = sc_age_2)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (LngtClass_2, .after = LngtClass)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (LngtClass_3, .after = LngtClass_2)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (sc_LngtClass_2, .after = sc_LngtClass)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate (sc_LngtClass_3, .after = sc_LngtClass_2)
  return(tableau)
}
```

Mettre le sexe numérique (données 0 et 1) en as.factor
```{r}
tableau_donnees_3$sexe_numerique <- as.factor(tableau_donnees_3$sexe_numerique)
```


Hareng
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_hareng_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Clupea harengus")
table_hareng_i <- table_hareng_i[order(table_hareng_i$Cohorte),]
table_hareng_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_hareng_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")
sapply(table_hareng_i, FUN = class)
sapply(table_hareng_i, FUN = summary)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_hareng_i)
```


```{r}
#M_i_H_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
#M_i_H_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_H_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#M_i_H_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#M_i_H_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW

# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_H_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_H_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_14 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_15 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_16 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_17 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_18 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_19 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_20 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_21 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#####################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +
#M_i_H_22 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_H_23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_24 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~   sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_25 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +
#M_i_H_26 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_27 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_28 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_29 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_30 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_31 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_33 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_34 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_35 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_36 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# sc_LngtClass sc_moy_AMO sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_37<- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_38 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_39 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_H_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
#M_i_H_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_H_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_H_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_H_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_H_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_H_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```


**Aiglefin**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_aiglefin_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Melanogrammus aeglefinus")
table_aiglefin_i <- table_aiglefin_i[-which(table_aiglefin_i$Age == max(table_aiglefin_i$Age)),]# individu de 22 ans ou alors enlever les individus qui ont un âgesupérieur à 10 ans 
table_aiglefin_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_aiglefin_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")
table_aiglefin_i <- table_aiglefin_i[order(table_aiglefin_i$Cohorte),]

fonction_corr(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
sapply(table_aiglefin_i, FUN = class)
sapply(table_aiglefin_i, FUN = summary)
#table_aiglefin_i <- table_aiglefin_i[-which(table_aiglefin_i$LngtClass == 760),]

#boxplot(table_aiglefin_i$sc_LngtClass)
#test <- table_aiglefin_i[which(table_aiglefin_i$LngtClass>700),]
#hist(test$LngtClass)


```

**Morue**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_morue_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Gadus morhua")
table_morue_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_morue_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")
table_morue_i <- table_morue_i[order(table_morue_i$Cohorte),]
unique(table_morue_i$fcohorte)
sapply(table_morue_i, FUN = summary)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_morue_i)
```

**Merlan**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_merlan_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Merlangius merlangus")
table_merlan_i <- table_merlan_i[-which(table_merlan_i$Age > 20),]
table_merlan_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_merlan_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")

sapply(table_merlan_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_merlan_i)#variables age et cohorte non corrélées
sapply(table_merlan_i, FUN = summary)
```

**Plie**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_plie_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Pleuronectes platessa")
table_plie_i <- table_plie_i[order(table_plie_i$Cohorte),]
table_plie_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_plie_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")

sapply(table_plie_i, FUN = class)
sapply(table_plie_i, FUN = summary)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_plie_i)
boxplot(table_plie_i$Age)
```

**Lieu**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_lieu_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Pollachius virens")
table_lieu_i <- table_lieu_i[order(table_lieu_i$Cohorte),]
table_lieu_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_lieu_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")
unique(table_lieu_i$fcohorte)
sapply(table_lieu_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_lieu_i)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
table_maquereau_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Scomber scombrus")
table_maquereau_i <- table_maquereau_i[order(table_maquereau_i$Cohorte),]
table_maquereau_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_maquereau_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")

sapply(table_maquereau_i, FUN = class)
sapply(table_maquereau_i, FUN = summary)
```

**Sprat**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_sprat_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Sprattus sprattus")
table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[order(table_sprat_i$Cohorte),]
table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[-which(table_sprat_i$Age > 6),]
table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[-which(table_sprat_i$LngtClass > 160),]
unique(table_sprat_i$fcohorte)#trous dans la série temporelle
table_sprat_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_sprat_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")


sapply(table_sprat_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_sprat_i)
sapply(table_sprat_i, FUN = summary)
```


**Tacaud**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_tacaud_i <- filter(tableau_donnees_3, Species == "Trisopterus esmarkii")
table_tacaud_i <- table_tacaud_i[order(table_tacaud_i$Cohorte),]
table_tacaud_i <-table_tacaud_i[-which(table_tacaud_i$Age > 7), ] # le tacaud vis environ 5 ans 
table_tacaud_i <- F_fusion_df(tableau = table_tacaud_i, Cohorte = "Cohorte")

sapply(table_tacaud_i, FUN = class)
sapply(table_tacaud_i, FUN = summary)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
```

### Modèles
```{r}
# Nuls
M_i_A_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_L_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Ma_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1  + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#Avec Cohortes
M_i_A_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_L_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Ma_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#polynome pour âge et taille degré 2
M_i_A_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_40_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))



#relancer les modèles en dessous
#polynome pour âge et taille degré 3
#M_i_A_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit)) #ne converge pas
#M_i_H_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))# ne converge pas
M_i_Me_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#M_i_Mo_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))# ne converge pas
#M_i_P_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_40_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 ) +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#Polynome taille degré 2
M_i_A_40_pt2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_L_40_pt2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40_pt2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#Polynome âge degré 2
M_i_Ma_40_pa2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#polynome taille degré 3
M_i_L_40_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_A_40_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#Polynome age degré 3
M_i_Ma_40_pa3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40_pa3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_age + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#combinaisons polynomes
M_i_H_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2, raw = TRUE)+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))# ne converge pas
M_i_H_402 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#M_i_Mo_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE)+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))# ne converge pas
M_i_A_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_A_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 )+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#M_i_S_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE)+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))# ne converge pas
M_i_T_40_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2)+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_40_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3)+  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#je remove les modèles qui n'ont pas convergés pour éviter de les utiliser 
#remove(M_i_S_40_pat32, M_i_Mo_40_pat32, M_i_P_40_pat3, M_i_Mo_40_pat3, M_i_H_40_pat3, M_i_A_40_pat3)
```
#plot diagnostique de linéarité des effets
```{r}
library(effects)
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))

#Aiglefin
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pt2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_A_40)
AIC(M_i_A_40_pat2)
##AIC(M_i_A_40_pat3)
AIC(M_i_A_40_pt2)
AIC(M_i_A_40_pat23)#
AIC(M_i_A_40_pat32)

#Lieu
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40_pt2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_L_40)
AIC(M_i_L_40_pt2)
AIC(M_i_L_40_pt3)#

#Maquereau
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40_pa2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40_pa3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_Ma_40)#
AIC(M_i_Ma_40_pa2)
AIC(M_i_Ma_40_pa3)

#Merlan
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_Me_40)
AIC(M_i_Me_40_pat2)
AIC(M_i_Me_40_pat3)##
AIC(M_i_Me_40_pat23)
AIC(M_i_Me_40_pat32)


#Morue
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pt2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_Mo_40)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pat2)
#AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pat3)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pt2)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pat23)
#AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pat32)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40_pt3)##

#Plie
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
##plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_P_40)
AIC(M_i_P_40_pat2)
##AIC(M_i_P_40_pat3)
AIC(M_i_P_40_pat23)
AIC(M_i_P_40_pat32)#

#Sprat
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_S_40)
AIC(M_i_S_40_pat2)
AIC(M_i_S_40_pat3)#
AIC(M_i_S_40_pat23)
#AIC(M_i_S_40_pat32)

#Tacaud
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_T_40)
AIC(M_i_T_40_pat2)
AIC(M_i_T_40_pat3)
AIC(M_i_T_40_pat23)
AIC(M_i_T_40_pat32)#

#Hareng
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_402, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
AIC(M_i_H_40)
AIC(M_i_H_40_pat2)#
#AIC(M_i_H_40_pat3)
#AIC(M_i_H_40_pat23)
AIC(M_i_H_402)
AIC(M_i_H_40_pa3)
AIC(M_i_H_40_pt3)

```
Donc on travail sur les modèles suivant : 
Aiglefin : M_i_A_40_pat23
Hareng : M_i_H_40_pat2
Lieu : M_i_L_40_pt3
Maquereau : M_i_Ma_40
Merlan : M_i_Me_40_pat3
Morue : M_i_Mo_40_pt3
Plie : M_i_P_40_pat32
Sprat : M_i_S_40_pat3
Tacaud : M_i_T_40_pat32




```{r}
vif(M_i_T_c)
plot(M_i_T_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_T_c)
Anova(M_i_T_c)
```

**plot diagnostiques**
<https://stackoverflow.com/questions/63751541/plot-does-not-show-all-diagnostic-plots-for-lme-lmer>
<https://goodekat.github.io/ggResidpanel/reference/resid_compare.html>

#### 21/04/2022
plots diagnostiques : résidus vs predictions, résidus vs variables explicatives , les predictions (refaire le SR) vs les observations, les predictions (refaire le SR) vs les variables explicatives et regarder la linéarité des effets avec le pakage effect

**Selon la procédure de Zuur, p230**

*Hareng*
```{r, include=FALSE}
#nouveau tableau
table_H_i2 <- select(table_hareng_i, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ,sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW)
sapply(table_hareng_i, FUN = summary)

#extraction des résidus
Res_P <- resid(M_i_H_40, type = "pearson")
Res_D <- resid(M_i_H_40, type = "deviance")
#Res_R <- table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),"sexe_numerique"] - Pred_R # résidus de type réponse

#extractions des prédictions (fonction de lien et réponse)
Pred_L_M40 <- predict(M_i_H_40, type = "link")
Pred_R_M40 <- predict(M_i_H_40, type = "response")

#paramètre de surdispersion
#surdispersion_parmtr <- sum(Res_P^2)/(n-p)

#Résidus de pearson scaled
#Res_P2 <- Res_R/sqrt(surdispersion_parmtr*Pred_R)

#on rajoute les predictions dans le tableau
#NA_vecteur <- rep(NA, 2682)
#Pred_M40_link <- c(NA_vecteur, Pred_R_lien)
table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, Pred_L_M40)

table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, Pred_R_M40)

#on rajoute les résidus de déviance aussi
#Res_D_M40 <- c(NA_vecteur, Res_D)

table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, Res_D)

######
#predictions vs observation
table_H_i2 <- mutate(table_H_i2, sexe_num_2 = as.integer(sexe_numerique))
table_H_i2 <- table_H_i2 %>% relocate(sexe_num_2, .after = sexe_numerique)

table_H_i2[which(table_H_i2$sexe_num_2 == 1),"sexe_num_2"] <- 0
table_H_i2[which(table_H_i2$sexe_num_2 == 2),"sexe_num_2"] <- 1
summary(table_H_i2$sexe_num_2)
```


**figures plot diagnostiques**
```{r}
#Résidus VS prediction
plot(M_i_H_40, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "response"), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 7, main = "deviance residuelle") 
plot(M_i_H_40, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "link"), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 7, main = "deviance residuelle") 


#Résidus VS Variables explicatives
ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = Cohorte, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Cohortes", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction du \ntemps chez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = LngtClass, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Taille", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla taille des individus chez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = Age, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nl'age des individus chez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = Moy_NAO_JFM, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "NAO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne mensuelle de la NAO sur les mois de janvier, février, mars\nchez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = Moy_AMO_d, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO chez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

ggplot(data = table_H_i2[-which(table_H_i2$Cohorte < 1966),], aes(x = GSNW_moy, y = Res_D)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.01, colour = "#660033") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
  ylim(-1.5,1.55) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(x = "GSNW", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle du GSNW chez le Hareng", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")
  

#linéarité des effets :
library(effects)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"))

#, lattice=list(layout=c(1, 4))

#Reproduction du sexe ratio observé
effectif <- rep(1, nrow(table_H_i2))
table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, effectif)
table_H_i2 <- table_H_i2 %>% relocate(effectif, .before = sexe_numerique)
summary(table_H_i2)

SR_obs_H <- aggregate(effectif ~  Species + Cohorte + sexe_num_2, data = table_H_i2, FUN = sum)
SR_obs_H <- SR_obs_H[order(SR_obs_H$Cohorte),]
SR_obs_H <- pivot_wider(SR_obs_H, names_from = sexe_num_2, values_from = effectif)
names(SR_obs_H)[names(SR_obs_H) == "0"] <- "Femelles"
names(SR_obs_H)[names(SR_obs_H) == "1"] <- "Males"

sum(is.na(SR_obs_H$Males))
sum(is.na(SR_obs_H$Femelles))
SR_obs_H <- mutate(SR_obs_H, SR_obs = Males/(Femelles + Males))

#Sexe ratio prédit 
SR_pred_H <- aggregate(Pred_R_M40 ~  Species + Cohorte, data = table_H_i2, FUN = mean)
SR_obs_pred_H <- left_join(SR_obs_H, SR_pred_H, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
remove(SR_pred_H, SR_obs_H)

ggplot(SR_obs_pred_H, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs), color = "#FFCC33", alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune
  geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs),  color = "#CC9900") +
  geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R_M40), color = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert
  geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R_M40), color = "#009966") +
  theme_light() +
  labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")

ggplot(SR_obs_pred_H, aes (x = SR_obs, y = Pred_R_M40)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_light()
```

#plot diagnostiques Hareng
```{r}
#on créer un sous ensemble de jeux de donnée avec les variables explicatives du modèles : deux fixées à leurs moyennes et l'autre qui varie et on fait les prédctions pour ces variables 

tableau_H_i3 <- select(table_H_i2, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM, sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW)

#Taille
tableau_H_i3$sc_cohorte <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_cohorte)
tableau_H_i3$sc_age <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_age, na.rm = TRUE)
predict_T <- predict(M_i_H_40, newdata = tableau_H_i3, type = "response")
table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2 ,predict_T)

SR_pred_t_H <-aggregate(predict_T ~ Species + Cohorte, table_H_i2, FUN = mean)
SR_obs_pred_H <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_H, SR_pred_t_H, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
remove(SR_pred_t_H)

#Age
tableau_H_i3 <- select(table_H_i2, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM, sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW)

tableau_H_i3$sc_cohorte <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_cohorte)
tableau_H_i3$sc_LngtClass <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_LngtClass, na.rm = TRUE)
predict_A <- predict(M_i_H_40, newdata = tableau_H_i3, type = "response")
table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2 ,predict_A)

SR_pred_a_H <-aggregate(predict_A ~ Species + Cohorte, data = table_H_i2, FUN = mean)
SR_obs_pred_H <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_H, SR_pred_a_H, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
remove(SR_pred_a_H)

#Cohorte
tableau_H_i3 <- select(table_H_i2, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM, sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW)

tableau_H_i3$sc_age <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_age)
tableau_H_i3$sc_LngtClass <- mean(tableau_H_i3$sc_LngtClass, na.rm = TRUE)
predict_C <- predict(M_i_H_40, newdata = tableau_H_i3, type = "response")
table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2 ,predict_C)

SR_pred_c_H <-aggregate(predict_C ~ Species + Cohorte, data = table_H_i2, FUN = mean)
SR_obs_pred_H <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_H, SR_pred_c_H, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
remove(SR_pred_c_H)

library(wesanderson)
ggplot(SR_obs_pred_H, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), size = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R_M40, colour = "Pred_R"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R_M40, colour = "Pred_R"), size = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = predict_T, colour = "Pred_T"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = predict_T, colour = "Pred_T"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(y = predict_A, colour = "Pred_A"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = predict_A, colour = "Pred_A"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(y = predict_C, colour = "Pred_C"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = predict_C, colour = "Pred_C"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Cavalcanti1", n = 5)) +
  theme_light() +
  labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
```

### Fonctions
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(effects)
library(wesanderson)
#Creation d'un sous ensemble de jeu de donnée
F_tableau_i2 <- function(tableau) {
  tableau_sp_i2 <- select(tableau, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM, sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW)
  return(tableau_sp_i2)
}

#extraction des résidus et predictions
F_resid_pred <- function(tableau, modele) {
  Res_P <- resid(modele, type = "pearson")#résidus de pearson
  Res_D <- resid(modele, type = "deviance")#résidus de déviance
  Pred_L <- predict(modele, type = "link")
  Pred_R <- predict(modele, type = "response")
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Pred_L)
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Pred_R)
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Res_D)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sexe_num_2 = as.integer(sexe_numerique))
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate(sexe_num_2, .after = sexe_numerique)
  tableau[which(tableau$sexe_num_2 == 1),"sexe_num_2"] <- 0
  tableau[which(tableau$sexe_num_2 == 2),"sexe_num_2"] <- 1
  return(tableau)
}


F_plot_resid_pred <- function(modele){
  Rd_vs_Pres <- plot(modele, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "response"), type = c("p","smooth"), col.line = 1, col = 7, main = "résidus de déviance en fonction des prédictions de type réponse")
  Rd_vs_Plink <- plot(modele, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "link"), type = c("p", "smooth"), col.line = 1, col = 7, main = "résidus logit en fonction des prédictions de type réponse")
  return(list("Residus_d_vs_predictions_reponse" = Rd_vs_Pres, "Residus_d_vs_predictions_lien" = Rd_vs_Plink))
}

F_SR_obs_pred <- function(tableau){
  #Reproduction du sexe ratio observé
  effectif <- rep(1, nrow(tableau))
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, effectif)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate(effectif, .before = sexe_numerique)
  SR_obs_sp <- aggregate(effectif ~  Species + Cohorte + sexe_num_2, data = tableau, FUN = sum)
  SR_obs_sp <- SR_obs_sp[order(SR_obs_sp$Cohorte),]
  SR_obs_sp <- pivot_wider(SR_obs_sp, names_from = sexe_num_2, values_from = effectif)
  names(SR_obs_sp)[names(SR_obs_sp) == "0"] <- "Femelles"
  names(SR_obs_sp)[names(SR_obs_sp) == "1"] <- "Males"
  SR_obs_sp <- mutate(SR_obs_sp, SR_obs = Males/(Femelles + Males))
  #prediction SR modele
  SR_pred_sp <- aggregate(Pred_R ~  Species + Cohorte, data = tableau, FUN = mean)
  SR_obs_pred_sp <- left_join(SR_obs_sp, SR_pred_sp, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
  
  return(SR_obs_pred_sp)
}

#fonction SR prédit par le modèle selon la variabilité d'une seule variable (permet de capturer l'effet des variables une à une)
F_SR_pred_VE <- function(tableau1, tableau2, modele, SR_obs_pred_sp, VE1, VE2, nom){
  tableau2[, VE1] <- mean(tableau2[, VE1])
  tableau2[, VE2] <- mean(tableau2[,VE2])
  predict_VE <- predict(modele, newdata = tableau2, type = "response")
  tableau1 <- cbind(tableau1, predict_VE)
  SR_pred_VE_sp <- aggregate(predict_VE ~  Species + Cohorte, data = tableau1, FUN = mean)
  SR_obs_pred_sp <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_sp, SR_pred_VE_sp, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
  names(SR_obs_pred_sp)[names(SR_obs_pred_sp) == "predict_VE"] <- nom
  return(SR_obs_pred_sp)
}




library(wesanderson)
names(wes_palettes)
F_plot_obs_pred <- function(tableau){
  SRpobs_vs_cohorte <- ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "Pred_R"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "Pred_R"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #orange : pred T
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #bleu : pred a 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_C, colour = "Pred_C"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #violet : pred C
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_C, colour = "Pred_C"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Cavalcanti1", n = 5)) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SRobs_vs_SRpred <-ggplot(tableau, aes (x = SR_obs, y = Pred_R)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, colour = "#666666", linetype = "dashed") +
    xlim(0.25,0.75) +
    ylim(0.25,0.75) +
    theme_light()
  return(list("SR predit et obs vs cohorte" = SRpobs_vs_cohorte, "SR predit vs SR obs"= SRobs_vs_SRpred))
}

names(wes_palettes)
```

Hareng 
```{r}
table_H_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)

table_H_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_H_i2, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_H_i2)
table_H_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

###############################################"

table_H_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)

table_H_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_H_i2, modele = M_i_H_40)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_H_i2)
table_H_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

###########################################################
```


**Aiglefin**
```{r}
table_A_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
table_A_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_A_i2, modele = M_i_A_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_A_40)

####################################
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-4, 4))))

####################################

#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = Cohorte, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Cohortes", y = "Résidus de type déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction du temps", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")
  
#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = LngtClass, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Taille", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla taille des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = Age, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Age", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nl'age des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = Moy_NAO_JFM, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "NAO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne mensuelle de la NAO sur les mois de janvier, février, mars", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_d, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO détendancée", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_brute, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO brute", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_A_i2, aes(x = GSNW_moy, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "GSNW", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle du GSNW", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

####################################
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_A_i2)
table_A_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_A_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")


F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_A)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

```{r}

table_A_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
table_A_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_A_i2, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23)
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_A_i2)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_A_40_pat23)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_A_40_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
table_A_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_A)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Lieu**
```{r}
table_L_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
table_L_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_L_i2, modele = M_i_L_40)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_L_40_pt3)

####################################
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-4, 4))))

####################################

#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = Cohorte, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Cohortes", y = "Résidus de type déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction du temps", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")
  
#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = LngtClass, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Taille", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla taille des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = Age, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Age", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nl'age des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = Moy_NAO_JFM, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "NAO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne mensuelle de la NAO sur les mois de janvier, février, mars", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_d, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO détendancée", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_brute, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO brute", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_L_i2, aes(x = GSNW_moy, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "GSNW", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle du GSNW", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

####################################
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_L_i2)

F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_L_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
table_L_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")

F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_L)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

```{r}
table_L_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
table_L_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_L_i2, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3)
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_L_i2)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_L_40_pt3)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_L_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
table_L_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_L)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

```

**Maquereau**
```{r}
table_Ma_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
table_Ma_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2, modele = M_i_Ma_40)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Ma_40)

####################################
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-4, 4))))

####################################

#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = Cohorte, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Cohortes", y = "Résidus de type déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction du temps", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")
  
#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = LngtClass, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Taille", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla taille des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = Age, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "Age", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nl'age des individus", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = Moy_NAO_JFM, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "NAO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne mensuelle de la NAO sur les mois de janvier, février, mars", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")


#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_d, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO détendancée", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = Moy_AMO_brute, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "AMO", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle de l'AMO brute", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

#ggplot(data = table_Ma_i2, aes(x = GSNW_moy, y = Res_D)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, colour = "#660033") +
#  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "#66CC99") +
#  ylim(-3,3) +
#  theme_light() +
#  labs(x = "GSNW", y = "Résidus de déviance", title = "Distribution des résidus de type déviance du modèle 40 en fonction de \nla moyenne annuelle du GSNW", subtitle = "sans sélection de cohortes a priori")

####################################
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Ma_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Ma_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
table_Ma_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Ma)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```


**Merlan**
