```{r}
table_Me_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
table_Me_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2, modele = M_i_Me_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Me_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2)
table_Me_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Me)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

################
table_Me_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
table_Me_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3)
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Me_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2)
table_Me_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)



F_SR_pred_VE <- function(tableau1, tableau2, modele, SR_obs_pred_sp, VE1, VE2, nom){
  tableau1 = table_Me_i2 
  tableau2 = table_Me_i3 
  modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3 
  SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me 
  VE1 = "sc_age" 
  VE2 = "sc_LngtClass"
  #nom = "Pred_T"
  tableau2[, VE1] <- mean(tableau2[, VE1])
  tableau2[, VE2] <- mean(tableau2[,VE2])
  predict_VE <- predict(modele, newdata = tableau2, type = "response")
  tableau1 <- cbind(tableau1, predict_VE)
  SR_pred_VE_sp <- aggregate(predict_VE ~  Species + Cohorte, data = tableau1, FUN = mean)
  SR_obs_pred_sp <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_sp, SR_pred_VE_sp, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
  names(SR_obs_pred_sp)[names(SR_obs_pred_sp) == "predict_VE"] <- nom
  return(SR_obs_pred_sp)
}


#M_i_Me_40_pat3
nbfcohorte<-which(abs(ranef(M_i_Me_40_pat3)$fcohorte) == min(abs(ranef(M_i_Me_40_pat3)$fcohorte)))
rownames(ranef(M_i_Me_40_pat3)$fcohorte)[nbfcohorte] #cohorte qui a le plus petit effet aléatoire
summary(table_merlan_i$fcohorte)


SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")


SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Me)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

summary(SR_obs_pred_Me)
mean(as.numeric(table_merlan_i$sexe_numerique)-1)

#exp(-0.26496)/(1+exp(-0.26496)) # sur dataframe qu'on utilise pour faire le modèle
# 0.4341448

############
MSR<- mean(table_Me_i2$sexe_num_2)
df.cohorte<-data.frame(sc_cohorte = unique(table_Me_i2$sc_cohorte)[order(unique(table_Me_i2$sc_cohorte))], cohorte = unique(table_Me_i2$Cohorte)[order(unique(table_Me_i2$sc_cohorte))]) 

beta_cohorte <-fixef(M_i_Me_40_pat3)[which(names(fixef(M_i_Me_40_pat3)) == "sc_cohorte")]

df.cohorte$pred_link <- logit(MSR) + beta_cohorte*df.cohorte$sc_cohorte
df.cohorte$pred_reponse <- i.logit(df.cohorte$pred_link)
mean(df.cohorte$pred_reponse)
names(df.cohorte)[names(df.cohorte) == "cohorte"] <- "Cohorte"
df.test <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_Me, df.cohorte, by = "Cohorte")

i.logit <- function(x){
  exp(x)/(1+exp(x))
}


  

ggplot(df.test, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "SR_obs"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "Pred_R"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "Pred_R"), size = 1) +
   # geom_point(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #orange : pred T
    #geom_line(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    #geom_point(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #bleu : pred a 
    #geom_line(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = pred_reponse, colour = "Pred_C"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #violet : pred C
    geom_line(aes(y = pred_reponse, colour = "Pred_C"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Cavalcanti1", n = 5)) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")

library(effects)
plot(effect("sc_cohorte", M_i_Me_40_pat3))
plot(allEffects(M_i_Me_40_pat3), ask = FALSE)
```

#### Important
Ne pas utiliser predict ==> problème avec l'intercept.
Pour la cohorte, comme c'est la même valeur pour tout le monde, on peut représenter la contribution de la cohorte à la prédiction du modèle sans avoir de décalge des précitions.
on créer une courbe d'effet cohorte nous même : on prend le sexe ratio moyen observé comme intercept et on créer des points sur une échelle logit : y = logit(SR_moyen) + betaCohorte (paramètre de la cohorte) * sc_cohorte


**Morue**
```{r}

table_Mo_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
table_Mo_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2, modele = M_i_Mo_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Mo_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2)
table_Mo_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Mo)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

################
table_Mo_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
table_Mo_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_Mo_40_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2)
table_Mo_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Mo)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

############

```


**Plie**

```{r}
table_P_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
table_P_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_P_i2, modele = M_i_P_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_P_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_P_i2)
table_P_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_P)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

################
table_P_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
table_P_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_P_i2, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_P_40_pat32)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_P_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_P_i2)
table_P_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_P)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

############


```

**Sprat**
```{r}
table_S_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
table_S_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = M_i_S_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_S_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_S)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

################
table_S_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
table_S_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_S_40_pat3)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_40_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_S)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

############

```



**Tacaud**
```{r}
table_T_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
table_T_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_T_i2, modele = M_i_T_40)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_T_40)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_T_i2)
table_T_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_T)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

################
table_T_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
table_T_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_T_i2, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_T_40_pat32)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_T_40_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_T_i2)
table_T_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_T)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

```

### Sans effets aléatoires
```{r}
M_i_A_40_pat23_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 ) +(1| Area), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + (1| Area), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_H_40_pat2_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2)  +   (1| Area), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

M_i_L_40_pt3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age + (1| Area), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Ma_40_b <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age , data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Me_40_pat3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )  +(1| Area), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age + (1| Area), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_P_40_pat32_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 ) + (1| Area), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_S_40_pat3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + (1| Area), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
M_i_T_40_pat32_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) +(1| Area), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

**Hareng**
```{r}
table_H_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(1996.2814, 1996.2815, 1996.2816, 1996.2817, 1996.2818, 1996.2819, rep(mean(table_H_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_H_i2)-6))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, fcohortemoy)
#1996.28147022857

#M_i_H_40_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40_b, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))

table_H_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_H_i2, modele = M_i_H_40_b)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_H_40_b)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_H_i2)
table_H_i3 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")

F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

###############################################"
table_H_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(1996.2814, 1996.2815, 1996.2816, 1996.2817, 1996.2818, 1996.2819, rep(mean(table_H_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_H_i2)-6))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_H_i2 <- cbind(table_H_i2, fcohortemoy)

#M_i_H_40_pat2_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + (1|fcohortemoy) +   (1| Area), data =  table_H_i2, family = binomial(link=logit))

F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_H_40_pat2_b)
plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_40_pat2_b, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))

table_H_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_H_i2, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2_b)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_H_i2)
table_H_i3 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = M_i_H_40_pat2_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")

F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Aiglefin**
```{r}
table_A_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
#a <- seq(1993.48, 1993.49, 0.001)
#fcohortemoy <- c(rep(a,100), rep(mean(table_A_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_A_i2)-length(a)*100))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_A_i2 <- cbind(table_A_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_A_40_pat23_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2 ) +(1| Area), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))#boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

table_A_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_A_i2, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23_b)
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_A_i2)
table_A_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = M_i_A_40_pat23_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_A)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Lieu**
```{r}
table_L_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(2002.4935, 2002.4936, 2002.4937, 2002.4938, 2002.4939, 2002.4934, 2002.4933, 2002.4932, rep(mean(table_L_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_L_i2)-8))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_L_i2 <- cbind(table_L_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_L_40_pt3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age  + (1| Area), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_L_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_L_i2, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3_b)

SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_L_i2)
table_L_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = M_i_L_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_L)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Maquereau**
```{r}
table_Ma_i2 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(2009.858, 2009.857, rep(mean(table_Ma_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_Ma_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_Ma_i2 <- cbind(table_Ma_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_Ma_40_b <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age, data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_Ma_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2, modele = M_i_Ma_40_b)

SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2)
table_Ma_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = M_i_Ma_40_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Ma)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Merlan**
```{r}
table_Me_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(1994.863, 1994.864, rep(mean(table_Me_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_Me_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_Me_i2 <- cbind(table_Me_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_Me_40_pat3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte +  poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )  +(1| Area), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_Me_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3_b)

#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3_b)
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2)
table_Me_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = M_i_Me_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Me)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Morue**
```{r}

table_Mo_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(1992.774, 1992.775, rep(mean(table_Mo_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_Mo_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_Mo_i2 <- cbind(table_Mo_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age+   (1| Area), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_Mo_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b)


#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b)
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2)
table_Mo_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Mo <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = M_i_Mo_40_pt3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Mo)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Plie**
```{r}
table_P_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(2005.307, 2005.306, rep(mean(table_P_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_P_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_P_i2 <- cbind(table_P_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_P_40_pat32_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3 )+ (1| Area), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_P_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_P_i2, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32_b)


#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_P_40_pat32_b)
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_P_i2)
table_P_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_P <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = M_i_P_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_P)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Sprat**
```{r}
table_S_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(2001.758, 2001.757, rep(mean(table_S_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_S_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_S_i2 <- cbind(table_S_i2, fcohortemoy)
#M_i_S_40_pat3_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3)+ (1| Area), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
table_S_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3_b)

#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_S_40_pat3_b)
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_S <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = M_i_S_40_pat3_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_S)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

**Tacaud**
```{r}

table_T_i2 <-F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
#fcohortemoy <- c(2000.215, 2000.214, rep(mean(table_T_i2$Cohorte), nrow(table_T_i2)-2))
#fcohortemoy <- as.factor(fcohortemoy)
#table_T_i2 <- cbind(table_T_i2, fcohortemoy)

#M_i_T_40_pat32_b <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) +(1| Area), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#summary(M_i_T_40_pat32_b)
table_T_i2 <-F_resid_pred(tableau = table_T_i2, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32_b)

#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = M_i_T_40_pat32_b)
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_T_i2)
table_T_i3 <- F_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_cohorte", nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_T <- F_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = M_i_T_40_pat32_b, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", nom = "Pred_C")
F_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_T)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```



# Integration des variables environnementales
```{r}
Mi_A_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_H__40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_L_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Ma_40_e<- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST, data = table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Me_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_P_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_plie_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_S_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_T_40_e <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))

vif(Mi_A_40_e)
vif(Mi_H__40_e)
vif(Mi_L_40_e)
vif(Mi_Ma_40_e)
vif(Mi_Me_40_e)
vif(Mi_Mo_40_e)
vif(Mi_P_40_e)
vif(Mi_S_40_e)
vif(Mi_T_40_e)

#Aigelfin : taille

#Mi_A_40_e_pt2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))# ne converge pas
Mi_A_40_e_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_A_40_e_pt3)
AIC(Mi_A_40_e)

#hareng : âge et taille
Mi_H_40_e_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_H_40_e_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
#Mi_H_40_e_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
#Mi_H_40_e_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
remove(Mi_H_40_e_pat3, Mi_H_40_e_pat32)

AIC(Mi_H_40_e_pat2) # AIC très fort
AIC(Mi_H__40_e)
AIC(Mi_H_40_e_pat32)
#on utilise l'AIC du modèle simple


#Lieu : plutôt linéaire
Mi_L_40_e_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_L_40_e_pt3)#
AIC(Mi_L_40_e)

#Maquereau
#rien a faire

#Merlan : surtout âge
Mi_Me_40_e_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)#
AIC(Mi_Me_40_e)

#Morue
#Mi_Mo_40_e_pt3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pa3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pt2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pa2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_LngtClass + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
#Mi_Mo_40_e_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_morue_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e)
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pa3)
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pt2)
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pa2)
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat2)#3
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat32)#2
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)#1
#remove(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat3, Mi_Mo_40_e_pt3)

#Plie : age et taille
Mi_P_40_e_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_plie_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_P_40_e_pat32)#
AIC(Mi_P_40_e)

#Sprat : age et taille
Mi_S_40_e_pat3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))#ne converge pas
Mi_S_40_e_pat2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_S_40_e_pat23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + poly(sc_age, degree = 2) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
Mi_S_40_e_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_S_40_e_pat2)
AIC(Mi_S_40_e_pat23)
AIC(Mi_S_40_e_pat32)# (mais n'a pas convergé dans le cas avec cohorte)
AIC(Mi_S_40_e)


#Tacaud age et taille
Mi_T_40_e_pat32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ poly(sc_LngtClass, degree = 2) + poly(sc_age, degree = 3, raw = TRUE) + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +sc_moy_AMO_d + sc_moy_GSNW + sc_SST + (1|Area), data = table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
AIC(Mi_T_40_e_pat32)#
AIC(Mi_T_40_e)



plot(predictorEffects(Mi_H_40_e_pat2, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_L_40_e_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
```

```{r}

plot(predictorEffects(Mi_A_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_H__40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_L_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Ma_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Me_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Mo_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_P_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_S_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_T_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
```

Fonctions à utiliser pour les variables environnementales 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(effects)
library(wesanderson)
library(palettetown)
#Creation d'un sous ensemble de jeu de donnée
Fenv_tableau_i2 <- function(tableau) {
  tableau_sp_i2 <- select(tableau, Cohorte, Area, Species, SR_cohorte, LngtClass, Age, sexe_numerique, fcohorte, Moy_NAO_JFM ,Moy_AMO_d, Moy_AMO_brute, GSNW_moy ,sc_cohorte, sc_LngtClass ,sc_age ,sc_Moy_NAO_JFM, sc_moy_AMO_d, sc_moy_AMO_brute, sc_moy_GSNW, sc_SST)
  return(tableau_sp_i2)
}

#extraction des résidus et predictions
F_resid_pred <- function(tableau, modele) {
  Res_P <- resid(modele, type = "pearson")#résidus de pearson
  Res_D <- resid(modele, type = "deviance")#résidus de déviance
  Pred_L <- predict(modele, type = "link")
  Pred_R <- predict(modele, type = "response")
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Pred_L)
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Pred_R)
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, Res_D)
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sexe_num_2 = as.integer(sexe_numerique))
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate(sexe_num_2, .after = sexe_numerique)
  tableau[which(tableau$sexe_num_2 == 1),"sexe_num_2"] <- 0
  tableau[which(tableau$sexe_num_2 == 2),"sexe_num_2"] <- 1
  return(tableau)
}


F_plot_resid_pred <- function(modele){
  Rd_vs_Pres <- plot(modele, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "response"), type = c("p","smooth"), col.line = 1, col = 7, main = "résidus de déviance en fonction des prédictions de type réponse")
  Rd_vs_Plink <- plot(modele, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "link"), type = c("p", "smooth"), col.line = 1, col = 7, main = "résidus logit en fonction des prédictions de type réponse")
  return(list("Residus_d_vs_predictions_reponse" = Rd_vs_Pres, "Residus_d_vs_predictions_lien" = Rd_vs_Plink))
}

F_SR_obs_pred <- function(tableau){
  #Reproduction du sexe ratio observé
  effectif <- rep(1, nrow(tableau))
  tableau <- cbind(tableau, effectif)
  tableau <- tableau %>% relocate(effectif, .before = sexe_numerique)
  SR_obs_sp <- aggregate(effectif ~  Species + Cohorte + sexe_num_2, data = tableau, FUN = sum)
  SR_obs_sp <- SR_obs_sp[order(SR_obs_sp$Cohorte),]
  SR_obs_sp <- pivot_wider(SR_obs_sp, names_from = sexe_num_2, values_from = effectif)
  names(SR_obs_sp)[names(SR_obs_sp) == "0"] <- "Femelles"
  names(SR_obs_sp)[names(SR_obs_sp) == "1"] <- "Males"
  SR_obs_sp <- mutate(SR_obs_sp, SR_obs = Males/(Femelles + Males))
  #prediction SR modele
  SR_pred_sp <- aggregate(Pred_R ~  Species + Cohorte, data = tableau, FUN = mean)
  SR_obs_pred_sp <- left_join(SR_obs_sp, SR_pred_sp, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
  
  return(SR_obs_pred_sp)
}
# ces 4 premieres fonctions ne changent pas par rapport à avant

#taille, age, NAO, AMO, GSNW, SST

#fonction SR prédit par le modèle selon la variabilité d'une seule variable (permet de capturer l'effet des variables une à une)
Fenv_SR_pred_VE <- function(tableau1, tableau2, modele, SR_obs_pred_sp, VE1, VE2,VE3, VE4, VE5, nom){
  tableau2[, VE1] <- mean(tableau2[, VE1])
  tableau2[, VE2] <- mean(tableau2[,VE2])
  tableau2[, VE3] <- mean(tableau2[,VE3])
  tableau2[, VE4] <- mean(tableau2[,VE4])
  tableau2[, VE5] <- mean(tableau2[,VE5])
  predict_VE <- predict(modele, newdata = tableau2, type = "response")
  tableau1 <- cbind(tableau1, predict_VE)
  SR_pred_VE_sp <- aggregate(predict_VE ~  Species + Cohorte, data = tableau1, FUN = mean)
  SR_obs_pred_sp <- left_join(SR_obs_pred_sp, SR_pred_VE_sp, by = c("Species", "Cohorte"))
  names(SR_obs_pred_sp)[names(SR_obs_pred_sp) == "predict_VE"] <- nom
  return(SR_obs_pred_sp)
}




Fenv_plot_obs_pred <- function(tableau){
  SRpobs_vs_cohorte <- ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_NAO, colour = "Pred_NAO"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_NAO, colour = "Pred_NAO"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_AMO_b, colour = "Pred_AMO_b"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_AMO_b, colour = "Pred_AMO_b"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_GSNW, colour = "Pred_GSNW"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_GSNW, colour = "Pred_GSNW"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_SST, colour = "Pred_SST"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_SST, colour = "Pred_SST"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SR_obspt <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_T, colour = "Pred_T"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
   SR_obspa <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_A, colour = "Pred_A"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
   
  SR_obspNAO <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_NAO, colour = "Pred_NAO"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_NAO, colour = "Pred_NAO"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SR_obspAMO <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_AMO_b, colour = "Pred_AMO_b"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_AMO_b, colour = "Pred_AMO_b"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SR_obspGSNW <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_GSNW, colour = "Pred_GSNW"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_GSNW, colour = "Pred_GSNW"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SR_obspSST <-ggplot(tableau, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), alpha = 0.5) + #Jaune color = "#FFCC33"
    geom_line(aes(y = SR_obs, colour = "observé"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + #vert color = "#339966"
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_R, colour = "prédit"), size = 1) + 
    geom_point(aes(y = Pred_SST, colour = "Pred_SST"), alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) + 
    geom_line(aes(y = Pred_SST, colour = "Pred_SST"), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2", name="sexe ratio", ) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(y = "sexe ratio", x = "Cohorte")
  
  SRobs_vs_SRpred <-ggplot(tableau, aes (x = SR_obs, y = Pred_R)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, colour = "#666666", linetype = "dashed") +
    xlim(0.25,0.75) +
    ylim(0.25,0.75) +
    theme_light()
  return(list("SR predit et obs vs cohorte" = SRpobs_vs_cohorte, "SR_obspt" = SR_obspt, "SR_obspa" = SR_obspa, "SR_obspNAO" = SR_obspNAO, "SR_obspAMO" = SR_obspAMO, "SR_obspGSNW" = SR_obspGSNW , "SR_obspSST" = SR_obspSST, "SR predit vs SR obs"= SRobs_vs_SRpred))
}

names(wes_palettes)
pokedex(60, 10)
```

hareng
```{r}
table_H_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)
table_H_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_H_i2, modele = Mi_H__40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_H__40_e)

SR_obs_pred_H <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_H_i2)
table_H_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_hareng_i)

SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_H <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_H_i2, tableau2 = table_H_i3, modele = Mi_H__40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_H, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)
Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_H)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```
```{r}
table_A_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
table_A_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_A_i2, modele = Mi_A_40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_A_40_e)

SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_A_i2)
table_A_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)

SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_A)$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

#################################
table_A_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
table_A_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_A_i2, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3)

SR_obs_pred_A <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_A_i2)
table_A_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)

SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_A <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_A_i2, tableau2 = table_A_i3, modele = Mi_A_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_A, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_A)
```
```{r}
table_L_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
table_L_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_L_i2, modele = Mi_L_40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_L_40_e)

SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_L_i2)
table_L_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)

SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_L)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

#################################
table_L_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)
table_L_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_L_i2, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3)

SR_obs_pred_L <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_L_i2)
table_L_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_lieu_i)

SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_L <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_L_i2, tableau2 = table_L_i3, modele = Mi_L_40_e_pt3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_L, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_L)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

```{r}

table_Ma_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
table_Ma_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_Ma_40_e)

#plot(Mi_Ma_40_e, resid(., type = "deviance") ~ predict(., type = "response"), type = c("p","smooth"), col.line = 1, col = 7, main = "résidus de déviance en fonction des prédictions de type réponse")

SR_obs_pred_Ma <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Ma_i2)
table_Ma_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_maquereau_i)

SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_Ma <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Ma_i2, tableau2 = table_Ma_i3, modele = Mi_Ma_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Ma, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Ma)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

```


```{r}

table_Me_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
table_Me_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2, modele = Mi_Me_40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_Me_40_e)

SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2)
table_Me_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)

SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

p1<-Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Me)

#################################
table_Me_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)
table_Me_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)

SR_obs_pred_Me <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Me_i2)
table_Me_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_merlan_i)

SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_obs_pred_Me <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Me_i2, tableau2 = table_Me_i3, modele = Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_obs_pred_Me, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")
p2 <-Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_obs_pred_Me)

p1$SR_obspSST
p2
```


```{r}
table_Mo_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
table_Mo_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_Mo_40_e)

SR_pred_obs_Mo <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2)
table_Mo_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)

SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_Mo)

#################################
table_Mo_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)
table_Mo_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)
F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)

SR_pred_obs_Mo <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_Mo_i2)
table_Mo_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_morue_i)

SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_Mo <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_Mo_i2, tableau2 = table_Mo_i3, modele = Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_Mo, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_Mo)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

```{r}

table_P_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
table_P_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_P_i2, modele = Mi_P_40_e)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_P_40_e)

SR_pred_obs_P <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_P_i2)
table_P_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)

SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_P)

#################################
table_P_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)
table_P_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_P_i2, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32)

SR_pred_obs_P <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_P_i2)
table_P_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_plie_i)

SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_P <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_P_i2, tableau2 = table_P_i3, modele = Mi_P_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_P, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_P)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```

```{r}

table_S_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
table_S_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = Mi_S_40_e)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_S_40_e)

SR_pred_obs_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)

SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_S)

#################################
table_S_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
table_S_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32)

SR_pred_obs_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)

SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_S)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`


#################################
table_S_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)
table_S_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_S_i2, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23)

SR_pred_obs_S <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_S_i2)
table_S_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_sprat_i)

SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_S <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_S_i2, tableau2 = table_S_i3, modele = Mi_S_40_e_pat23, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_S, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_P)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`
```
```{r}
table_T_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
table_T_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_T_i2, modele = Mi_T_40_e)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_T_40_e)

SR_pred_obs_T <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_T_i2)
table_T_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)

SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_T)

#################################
table_T_i2 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
table_T_i2 <- F_resid_pred(tableau = table_T_i2, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32)
#F_plot_resid_pred(modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32)

SR_pred_obs_T <- F_SR_obs_pred(tableau = table_T_i2)
table_T_i3 <- Fenv_tableau_i2(tableau = table_tacaud_i)

SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_T")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_LngtClass", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_A")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_LngtClass", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_NAO")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_LngtClass", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_AMO_b")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_LngtClass", VE5= "sc_SST",nom = "Pred_GSNW")
SR_pred_obs_T <- Fenv_SR_pred_VE(tableau1 = table_T_i2, tableau2 = table_T_i3, modele = Mi_T_40_e_pat32, SR_obs_pred_sp = SR_pred_obs_T, VE1 = "sc_age", VE2 = "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", VE3 = "sc_moy_AMO_d", VE4 = "sc_moy_GSNW", VE5= "sc_LngtClass",nom = "Pred_SST")

Fenv_plot_obs_pred(tableau = SR_pred_obs_T)#$`SR predit et obs vs cohorte`

```
```{r}

plot(predictorEffects(Mi_A_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_H__40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_L_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Ma_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Me_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Mo_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_P_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_S_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_T_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
```

```{r}
library(effects)
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_A_40_e_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_H__40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_L_40_e_pt3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Ma_40_e, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_P_40_e_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_S_40_e_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))
plot(predictorEffects(Mi_T_40_e_pat32, residuals=TRUE), partial.residuals=list(lty="dashed"), axes = list(y = list(lim = c(-6, 6))))


```


```{r}
AIC(Mi_A_40_e_pt3)#
AIC(Mi_A_40_e)

AIC(M_i_H_40)
AIC(Mi_H__40_e)

AIC(Mi_L_40_e_pt3)#
AIC(Mi_L_40_e)

AIC(M_i_Ma_40)
AIC(Mi_Ma_40_e)#

AIC(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)#

AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)#
AIC(Mi_Mo_40_e)

AIC(Mi_P_40_e_pat32)#
AIC(Mi_P_40_e)

AIC(Mi_S_40_e_pat32)#
AIC(Mi_S_40_e)

AIC(Mi_T_40_e_pat32)#
AIC(Mi_T_40_e)
```

```{r}
summary(Mi_A_40_e_pt3)
summary(Mi_H__40_e)
summary(Mi_L_40_e_pt3)
summary(Mi_Ma_40_e)
summary(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)
summary(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)
summary(Mi_P_40_e_pat32)
summary(Mi_S_40_e_pat32)
summary(Mi_T_40_e_pat32)
```

```{r}
summary(Mi_A_40_e)
summary(Mi_H__40_e)
summary(Mi_L_40_e)
summary(Mi_Ma_40_e)
summary(Mi_Me_40_e)
summary(Mi_Mo_40_e)
summary(Mi_P_40_e)
summary(Mi_S_40_e)
summary(Mi_T_40_e)
```

```{r}
vif(Mi_A_40_e)
vif(Mi_H__40_e)
vif(Mi_L_40_e)
vif(Mi_Ma_40_e)
vif(Mi_Me_40_e)
vif(Mi_Mo_40_e)
vif(Mi_P_40_e)
vif(Mi_S_40_e)
vif(Mi_T_40_e)

vif(Mi_A_40_e_pt3)
vif(Mi_H__40_e)
vif(Mi_L_40_e_pt3)
vif(Mi_Ma_40_e)
vif(Mi_Me_40_e_pat3)
vif(Mi_Mo_40_e_pat23)
vif(Mi_P_40_e_pat32)
vif(Mi_S_40_e_pat32)
vif(Mi_T_40_e_pat32)
```
